description: The 2018 Diciotti incident, where the Italian government, led by Matteo Salvini, refused to allow a coast guard ship carrying 177 migrants to dock. This event polarized Italian public opinion regarding Mediterranean rescue missions.

key_events.description: Salvini’s populist rhetoric gains traction regarding 'closing the ports'.
UNHCR calls for immediate resolution as conditions on the ship deteriorate.
Catholic Church and EU partners agree to accept migrants, de-escalating the crisis.

calibration_notes: Useful for measuring the impact of populist rhetoric versus international humanitarian pressure.
